businessInfo.name: Acme Plumbing Co.
businessInfo.valueProp: Family-owned plumbing serving the metro area for 20+ years. Emergency response, transparent pricing, written satisfaction guarantee on every job.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: 24/7 response for burst pipes, leaks, and clogs. Most calls resolved in under two hours.

services.title: Water Heater Install
services.description: Tank and tankless installs with a 10-year manufacturer warranty and our own 5-year workmanship guarantee.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Full camera inspection plus hydro-jetting to clear and verify the line - not just a quick snake.
